name: Jackson Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jackson Park in Vienna, WV! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: Open play every morning at 9am, and every evening, times vary, contact MOV Facebook Page

name: Jackson Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Jackson Park Pickleball Courts in Vienna, WV! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Parkersburg City Park
description: Parkersburg City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Parkersburg, WV. There are 6 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Parkersburg YMCA
description: Parkersburg YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Parkersburg, WV. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Southwood Park
description: Come play pickleball at Southwood Park in Parkersburg, WV! There are 7 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
